title: Primary: toxicity-gated intraday overshoot-reversion signal (pure rule-based) + features (multi-level OFI, microprice, VPIN-proxy)
source: Split of epic B0162 per methodology survey (docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-11-l2-microstructure-methodology-survey.md)
why: Survey rank-1 (BUILD primary, advisor-estimated 30-50% pass probability): fade vol-scaled short-horizon moves when OFI/microprice says aggressor flow exhausted AND toxicity gates say liquidity-driven. The only family where target move (1-3x spread) >> cost at 10-45 min holding on this feed.
scope: Feature primitives: integrated multi-level OFI (Cont-Cucuringu-Zhang PCA form, degrades to L1), Stoikov microprice, tick-rule-signed VPIN proxy, realized-vol gate.
Pure rule-based primary returning {-1,0,+1} (pure-primary invariant; no .fit()).
Run through B0164 harness on the Jun-15 sample; confirmatory run on holdout exactly once per B0165.

history.reason: feat(B0162): CEO commits Jun 15-21 L2/microstructure build; methodology survey accepted + epic split B0163-B0168
pm-day 2026-06-12: dispatched to execution-engineer; pre-data code build against synthetic fixtures; real-data runs wait for Jun-15

B0166 code scope built TDD pre-data (synthetic only): pipeline/intraday_features.py (integrated multi-level OFI w/ training-fitted PCA weights + L1 degradation, Stoikov microprice/displacement, VPIN-proxy, trailing RV, training-percentile helper, bar-clock aggregation), pipeline/osr_intraday.py (pure rule-based osr_signal per pre-registration 1.1; toxicity 0.90 + session blackout frozen), scripts/run_osr_validation.py (trials 1-6 train->val runner; holdout structurally unreachable). 79 new tests; full suite 1768 passed. REAL-DATA validation remains OPEN for Jun-15 (runs + B0165 confirmatory holdout are separate manual steps).
code-build scope complete (pre-data). Real-data Jun-15 validation + single confirmatory holdout run tracked by B0165 protocol, not this entry.
